install.title: Install app
install.description: Add Olhar de Tutor to your home screen for quick access, even without internet.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Receive check-in reminders and health event alerts in your device language.
notifications.blocked: Notifications blocked in browser. Enable them in your device settings.
notifications.unavailable: Notifications not available on this device.
notifications.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Enable in your browser settings.
